rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File Compulsory Cross-Complaint

rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - DENY AS TO NUISANCE, BREACH OF CONTRACT, AND TRESPASS. PLAINTIFF SEEKS DAMAGES ON THESE CAUSES OF ACTION YET HAS PROVIDED NO PROOF AS TO THE AMOUNT. DAMAGE IS AN ELEMENT OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION AS PLEADED AND A MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION MUST COMPLETELY DISPOSE OF A CAUSE OF ACTION. SEE CCP 437C(F)(1). DENY AS TO DECLARATORY RELIEF CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE UNNECESSARY AND SUPERFLUOUS. SEE HOOD V. SUPERIOR COURT, (1995) 33 CAL.APP.4TH 319, 324. DENY AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INJUNCTION BECAUSE OF CONTESTED FACTUAL ISSUES. PLAINTIFF'S REMEDY IS/WAS TO SEEK A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION BY MOTION AND/OR A PERMANENT INJUNCTION AT TRIAL. (PB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION GRANTED. MOTION DENIED IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE RETALIATION. (JH)
